meta.description: Backend developer focused on integrations and automation: Java Spring Boot, N8N, PostgreSQL, Docker, Cloudflare. Architecture first, code second. Araraquara, Brazil.
hero.status: Open to new challenges · Araraquara, Brazil
hero.tagline: Architecture first. Code second. Complexity never.
about.title:
Method before
implementation
about.p1: Software developer focused on backend architecture, complex system integrations and process automation. Before writing any code, I plan the structure, read the documentation and pick the solution that best fits the context — not the most hyped one.
about.p2: Holding a B.Sc. in Computer Science (UNIP, 2024), I work end to end on the architecture and maintenance of integrations between ERPs, e-commerce platforms and third-party services — combining infrastructure, business logic and iPaaS tooling, with constant focus on reducing manual work, performance and failure monitoring.
about.p3: I study AI-driven development in depth, applying Spec Driven Development, Test Driven Development and agentic approaches.
about.creds.title: Certifications & Languages
about.creds.english: English B2 — technical reading and professional work

exp.fw.i3: RESTful APIs validated with structured Postman test suites
exp.fw.i4: Containerization with Docker and versioning via Git/GitLab

exp.jbt.i2: User support, telecom and machine setup

projects.title: Public code, in production and in study
projects.lead: A selection from my GitHub. Filter by technology to see what interests you.
projects.p1.desc: System that automatically syncs N8N workflows to GitHub and allows individual flow restoration. Full automation versioning — each workflow with its own history.
projects.p2.desc: Complete Spring Boot API with Base62 encoding, click analytics and PostgreSQL persistence. Organized domain modeling and well-defined REST endpoints.
projects.p3.desc: Authentication and authorization implementation with Spring Security and JWT tokens. Useful base for studying and evolving protected APIs.
projects.p4.desc: Terminal-inspired web interface to structure project documentation for AI development. Generates files ready for repositories and agent-driven workflows.
projects.p5.desc: Full PHP application exploring MVC architecture patterns and MySQL persistence.
